prompt: Replace polling with SSE. The backend supports SSE at /api/executions/{id}/events. Create frontend/lib/sse.ts with a useExecutionEvents hook using EventSource. Update frontend/app/page.tsx and frontend/app/executions/[id]/page.tsx to use the hook instead of setInterval(fetchAll, 5000). The hook should connect to SSE endpoint, parse events, and call onEvent callback. Output COMPLETE when done.
